summary_en: 7,164,875 shares (2.29% of S/O) to be cancelled on May 28, 2026. Shares acquired via self-tender offer initiated May 14, 2025. Post-cancellation S/O: 305,265,402 shares.
title_en: Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Nissui Corporation's board of directors resolved on May 14, 2026 to cancel 7,164,875 treasury shares, representing 2.29% of shares outstanding prior to cancellation. These shares were acquired via public tender offer announced on May 14, 2025. The cancellation is scheduled for May 28, 2026 and is undertaken to enhance capital efficiency and return value to shareholders. Post-cancellation, issued share count will be 305,265,402 shares.
